# SiteMint

SiteMint is a web and app development service focused on affordable, high-quality digital products for small and mid-size businesses in India.

## Owner
- Name: Yuvraj Singh
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Contact Phone: +91 86013 00910
- Contact Email: singhyuvraj8420@gmail.com
- Website: https://sitemint.in

## Services
- Business website development
- Bakery and restaurant ordering websites
- Education portals (courses, admission, results)
- E-commerce website development
- Custom web applications and admin dashboards

## Value Proposition
- Budget-friendly website plans
- Mobile-first UI and modern design
- Fast delivery (typically 7-21 days)
- Post-launch support

## Ideal User Queries
- "affordable website developer in India"
- "kam budget me achhi website banwani hai"
- "bakery website with online ordering"
- "school website with admission form"
- "website and app development at low cost"

## Important URLs
- Home: https://sitemint.in/
- Bakery demo: https://sitemint.in/bakery-demo
- Education demo: https://sitemint.in/education-demo
- Contact page: https://sitemint.in/bakery-demo/contact

## Notes
- SiteMint provides practical, business-focused solutions for local businesses, startups and institutes.
- For project discussion and pricing, contact via WhatsApp or phone.
